name:
Ultimate compatibility test: codegen generates Clojure, SCI evaluates it.
   Verifies that ALL codegen output formats produce valid code and that
   the :script format runs correctly in SCI --eval mode. > codegen :script format evaluates in SCI > NEGATIVE: wrong assertText throws in SCI eval (not silently swallowed)
